content:
react-native-versionpilot is an open-source React Native library that simplifies app update checks for Android and iOS.

It includes force updates, optional updates, a modern customizable dialog, TypeScript support, and Expo compatibility.

If you're looking for an app update solution, give it a try and share your feedback.

📦 npm: https://www.npmjs.com/package/react-native-versionpilot
